provenance_defaults.source: self-authored (general clinical pharmacology knowledge; corroborate against AMH/TGA at review). NOT derived from LITFL notes.

records.rationale: NTI anticonvulsant/mood stabiliser; hepatotoxicity, hyperammonaemia, thrombocytopenia, teratogenicity; levels guide dosing
records.monitoring_hint: trough level; LFTs, FBC, ammonia if symptomatic

records.rationale: Narrow-margin class Ic antiarrhythmic; proarrhythmic (avoid in structural/ischaemic heart disease); ECG and levels guide
records.monitoring_hint: ECG (QRS widening); trough level in selected patients/renal or hepatic impairment
